name: ml-hclust
when_to_use: 想画 dendrogram、展示样本自底向上如何逐级合并(基因/文档/相似度聚类)时用它,产出带合并高度的二叉树;要固定 k 个扁平簇改用 skmeans。注意 +esm 只暴露自底向上的 agnes(与 Cluster),自顶向下的 diana 未打进 bundle。
why_valuable: 树状聚类图要先算 linkage(single/complete/average/ward)得到带合并高度的二叉树,AI 徒手编不出正确的合并顺序与高度。ml-hclust 的 agnes 直接给出这棵可渲染的聚类树(children/height/index + cut/traverse/indices),交给树布局即可画 dendrogram。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you want to draw a dendrogram or show how samples merge bottom-up step by step, such as clustering genes, documents, or similarities. It produces a binary tree with merge heights. For a fixed k of flat clusters, use skmeans instead. Note that +esm exposes only the bottom-up agnes (and Cluster); the top-down diana is not included in the bundle.
en.why_valuable: A dendrogram first needs linkage, such as single/complete/average/ward, to produce a binary tree with merge heights. AI cannot invent the correct merge order and heights by hand. ml-hclust's agnes directly returns a renderable cluster tree with children/height/index plus cut/traverse/indices, ready for a tree layout.

data_in.note: data is a number[][] point array by default, using Euclidean distance internally. If a symmetric distance matrix is already available, set isDistanceMatrix:true and pass that matrix directly. The output is a hierarchy; render a dendrogram with height on the vertical axis.

schema.data: number[][] - equal-length point vectors to cluster; or, when isDistanceMatrix=true, a symmetric distance matrix
schema.isDistanceMatrix?: boolean - whether data is already a distance matrix, default false (otherwise Euclidean distance is computed internally)

data_in.note: data 默认是 number[][] 点数组(内部按欧氏距离);若已算好对称距离矩阵则设 isDistanceMatrix:true 直接传矩阵。输出是层次树,渲染 dendrogram 用纵轴 = height。

schema.data: number[][] —— 待聚类的点数组(每点等长向量);或当 isDistanceMatrix=true 时传对称距离矩阵
schema.isDistanceMatrix?: boolean —— data 是否已是距离矩阵,默认 false(内部按欧氏距离计算)

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;纯 JS 数值层。产出是层次树数据,交由树/dendrogram 渲染器画。
provides.outputs: 可渲染二叉合并树 Cluster:{children, height 合并高度, index 叶子原始下标, size, isLeaf};附 cut(threshold)/group(n)/traverse(cb)/indices() 工具。

api_surface.build: agnes(data, { method?, distanceFunction?, isDistanceMatrix? }) → Cluster(注意 diana 不在 +esm)
api_surface.tree: cluster.children(子节点) · cluster.height(合并高度) · cluster.index(叶子原始下标) · cluster.size · cluster.isLeaf
api_surface.ops: cluster.cut(threshold) → Cluster[](按高度切扁平簇) · cluster.group(n) · cluster.traverse(cb)(深度优先) · cluster.indices() → 不交叉画树的叶子顺序

peer.note: 本条只产聚类树数据:把 Cluster 的 children/height 喂给 d3-hierarchy 的 cluster/tree 布局,用 height 定纵轴、indices() 定叶子横序画 dendrogram。

boot.note: 输入 data 为 number[][] 点数组(默认内部欧氏距离);若已是对称距离矩阵设 isDistanceMatrix:true。method 默认 'complete',ward/average/single 等见 api_surface。产出是层次树而非固定 k 分区。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr ml-hclust@4.0.0 +esm: named exports are exactly `{Cluster, agnes}` (`export{p as Cluster,$ as agnes}`); diana.js/diana.d.ts exist in the package but diana is NOT in the +esm bundle (0 'diana' refs), so boot uses agnes only. agnes.d.ts: agnes<T>(data:T[], options?:{ distanceFunction?, method?:AgglomerationMethod (default 'complete'), isDistanceMatrix? })→Cluster; AgglomerationMethod ∈ single|complete|average|upgma|wpgma|median|wpgmc|centroid|upgmc|ward|ward2. cluster.d.ts: Cluster{ children:Cluster[]; height; size; index; isLeaf; cut(threshold)→Cluster[]; group(groups); traverse(cb); indices()→number[] }. Deps ml-matrix/heap/ml-distance-*; grep of +esm for document.*/window.*/globalThis.*/appendChild/createElement/addEventListener/localStorage = 0 hits — pure numeric, shadow-safe.
